front: What is MALDI-TOF MS and when is it used?
back: Matrix-Assisted Laser Desorption/Ionization Time-of-Flight MS uses a laser to desorb/ionize peptides co-crystallized with a matrix (CHCA, DHB). Produces predominantly singly charged ions. Used for: intact mass confirmation, peptide fingerprinting, quality control, and high-throughput screening.
